records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that tremor just now? A landslide?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that tremor just now? A landslide?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that tremor just now? A landslide?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I felt it too. It was like the shockwave from something colliding head-on...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I felt it too. It was like the shockwave from something colliding head-on...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I felt it too. It was like the shockwave from something colliding head-on...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two Divinity energies... One is a blazing violet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two Divinity energies... One is a blazing violet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two Divinity energies... One is a blazing violet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the other is white, piercing through that violet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the other is white, piercing through that violet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the other is white, piercing through that violet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It has to be Commander!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It has to be Commander!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It has to be Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Master's coordinates are clearly in a different dimension from here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Master's coordinates are clearly in a different dimension from here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Master's coordinates are clearly in a different dimension from here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asmodeus and Master are fighting...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asmodeus and Master are fighting...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asmodeus and Master are fighting...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The impact is strong enough to carry across dimensions?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The impact is strong enough to carry across dimensions?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The impact is strong enough to carry across dimensions?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even you should know by now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even you should know by now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even you should know by now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That won't be enough to defeat me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That won't be enough to defeat me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That won't be enough to defeat me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I can't defeat you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I can't defeat you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I can't defeat you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going to become a Valkyrie. Not a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're going to become a Valkyrie. Not a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going to become a Valkyrie. Not a Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, why? Afraid you'd lose if I became a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, why? Afraid you'd lose if I became a Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, why? Afraid you'd lose if I became a Demon Lord?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you already forgotten the oath you made with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you already forgotten the oath you made with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you already forgotten the oath you made with me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I teach the Antagonist so she can stand against the Demon Lord. Not so she can become one!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I teach the Antagonist so she can stand against the Demon Lord. Not so she can become one!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I teach the Antagonist so she can stand against the Demon Lord. Not so she can become one!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph, you can shove that oath. I prefer whichever path sounds more interesting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph, you can shove that oath. I prefer whichever path sounds more interesting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, you can shove that oath. I prefer whichever path sounds more interesting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahahaha!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahahaha!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahahaha!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Winning or losing doesn't matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Winning or losing doesn't matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Winning or losing doesn't matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm already...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm already...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm already...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Enjoying this! Fully prepared to burn everything away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Enjoying this! Fully prepared to burn everything away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Enjoying this! Fully prepared to burn everything away!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Buy me some time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Buy me some time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Buy me some time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the only one who can stop the Valkyrie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the only one who can stop the Valkyrie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the only one who can stop the Valkyrie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't give me orders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't give me orders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't give me orders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just point me to where she is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just point me to where she is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just point me to where she is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Valkyrie is a servant of Tammiel. A being guaranteed victory by the law of the Tree of Sephiroth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Valkyrie is a servant of Tammiel. A being guaranteed victory by the law of the Tree of Sephiroth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Valkyrie is a servant of Tammiel. A being guaranteed victory by the law of the Tree of Sephiroth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how strong you are, you can't defeat a law with brute force.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how strong you are, you can't defeat a law with brute force.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how strong you are, you can't defeat a law with brute force.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should stall for time but avoid facing her head-on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You should stall for time but avoid facing her head-on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You should stall for time but avoid facing her head-on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Avoid her because she's protected by a law? That's ridiculous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Avoid her because she's protected by a law? That's ridiculous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Avoid her because she's protected by a law? That's ridiculous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're trying to break that damn law yourself anyway, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're trying to break that damn law yourself anyway, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're trying to break that damn law yourself anyway, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'd better not fail after receiving my help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'd better not fail after receiving my help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'd better not fail after receiving my help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What are you doing?! Burn brighter!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What are you doing?! Burn brighter!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What are you doing?! Burn brighter!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So our battle can shine even more!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So our battle can shine even more!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So our battle can shine even more!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's time to bring this to an end, Asmodeus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's time to bring this to an end, Asmodeus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's time to bring this to an end, Asmodeus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rosaria.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rosaria.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rosaria.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come at me, my damned Master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come at me, my damned Master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come at me, my damned Master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kriemhild!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kriemhild!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kriemhild!
